files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles. The first is 'Birth Control' featuring statements from five church leaders on the topic. The second begins 'A Priceless Golden Wedding' about Julina L. Smith's 50th wedding anniversary. There appears to be some text cut off at the end of the second article, suggesting it may continue in another file.

files.notes: This file contains two distinct Guide Lessons - Lesson I on Prevention of Disease and Lesson II on The Teeth and Their Care. Both are part of the Summer Health Lessons series for August 1916. The first lesson is specifically attributed to Dr. Charles F. Wilcox with a commendation note.
